bits.name: GPIODMSK
bits.comment: GPIODATA register can be read/write if GPIO DMSK set "1"

bits.name: GPIODIR
bits.comment: "1" configure gpio bits to be output "0" configure gpio bits to be input

bits.name: GPIOIS
bits.comment: "1" detect signals level "0" detect signals edge

bits.name: GPIOIBE
bits.comment: "1" both edges trigger an interrupt, "0" interrupt generation event is controlled by GPIOIEV

bits.name: GPIOIEV
bits.comment: GPIO bits interrupt event register: "1" high levels trigger interrupts, "0" low levels trigger interrupts.

bits.name: GPIOIE
bits.comment: GPIO bits interrupt enable register: "1" corresponding bit interrupt is enabled. "0" corresponding bit interrupt isn't enabled

bits.name: GPIORIS
bits.comment: GPIO bits raw interrupt status register: "1" interrupt condition met "0" condition not met

bits.name: GPIOMIS
bits.comment: GPIO bits masked interrupt status register: "1" Interrupt active "0" interrupt not active

bits.name: GPIOIC
bits.comment: GPIO bits interrupt clear register: "1" clears detected interrupt. "0" has no effect.

bits.name: GPIOINEN
bits.comment: GPIO input enable register: "1" input enable. "0" input disable.
